prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-HOLIDAY-XMAS-TRAIN-TOY Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: Holiday Classic Christmas Toy Train Set 1:48 Scale with Lights Sounds Real Smoke, Black Description: Chooo Choooo.. Look at that toy train coming around the bend. Woweeeee, what child doesn't love a battery powered Christmas train set around the Christmas tree.

This fun toy train set is larger than life, a 1:48 O Scale electric train set that comes with 4 bright colored cars; a locomotive toy train engine, carriage car, oil tanker and a open car loader to carry your favorite holiday Christmas decorations in around the tracks. This is the funnest holiday train set a child could receive on Christmas Day. The festive holiday theme will surly add to the nostalgia and charm of your own family Christmas traditions and best of all this kids electric train set is a snap to put together. You'll be ready to run in under ten minutes.

This toy electric train set operates on (4) AA batteries and is able to zoom around the track with lights and sounds while blowing smoke. The authentic train whistle sound coming from the engine compartment will make the experience real for your child. Each train set comes with curved and straight track pieces that can create an oval train track or a circle train track. The train track pieces easily snap into place and come apart for convenient storage and transportation. You'll be ready to run in under ten minutes.

The 20 Piece Deluxe Christmas Train Set comes with 4 train cars, 4 straight tracks, and 12 curved tracks. This battery operated train set will ensure hours of fun for kids and will make your house look especially festive this holiday season. Search Terms: train set toys Christmas decorations Christmas tree Christmas decor Christmas train sets for under the tree Christmas train Christmas tree train holiday decor kids learning and education toys unique gifts DIY projects Features: - LARGE SCALE TOY TRAIN SET: If your little ones like trains, they'll love this large scale 20 piece train set they can put together with friends family! With real, billowing smoke, fun sounds and lights, the train set is both fun and a great learning tool too! - REAL WHISTLING TRAIN: The toy train features a real whistling sound coming from the engine compartment, making the toy train set even more fun and interactive as it moves around the tracks - REAL SMOKE LIGHTS AND MUSIC: The train set is able to move around the track blowing real smoke, alongside working lights and music - TOY TRAIN SET TRACKS: Each train toy set comes with curved and straight track pieces and creates an oval track; the track pieces easily snap into place and come apart for convenient storage - FUN LEARNING TOOL: Putting together the toy train set with kids is fun project that allows them to improve on dexterity and coordination, creativity and cognitive problem solving skills === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: KidPlay Products 20-Piece Black Christmas Toy Train Set

openai.item_name: KidPlay Products 1:48 Black Holiday Christmas Toy Train Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 148 O Scale, Real Smoke And Lights, Authentic Whistle Sound, Battery Operated, Snap-Together Tracks

openai.title_differentiation: 20 Piece Set, Battery Operated, Real Smoke, Lights And Sounds, Whistling Train, Snap Together Track, For Kids
